title: 日本ダービーの後に・追いついた！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower pulls out all the stops at the
Japanese Derby and beats Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she can't let up just because she managed to
win this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the long-distance Kikuka Sho, where
she will face off against Mihono Bourbon once
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This upcoming race will be make-or-break for a
stayer like Rice Shower, so it's back to training for
us.
